setup.title: System Initialization
setup.description: Set up database encryption to protect your data.

step1.title: Set Master Password
step1.description: Choose a strong password to encrypt the database. This password will be required each time the system restarts.
step1.bootstrapTokenPlaceholder: Paste the token from server logs
step1.bootstrapTokenHint: Look up BOOTSTRAP_TOKEN in the server's stderr at startup, or read it from <data dir>/bootstrap-token.txt. It is auto-generated each boot and removed once setup completes.
step1.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 12 characters

step2.warningDetail: If you forget your password, this backup key is the only way to unlock the database. Store it securely.
step2.label: Backup Key (for password recovery)
step2.confirm: I have securely saved the backup key
step2.exportRequired: Download or copy the backup key before continuing.

step3.title: Initialization Complete
step3.description: Database encryption is active. Click below to continue.

unlock.title: System Locked
unlock.description: Enter your master password to unlock the system.
unlock.invalidKey: Invalid password or key. Please try again.
unlock.localNote: Decryption is performed locally in your browser. Your password and key never leave this device.
unlock.rateLimited: Too many unlock attempts. Please wait a few minutes and try again.
unlock.systemUnavailable: Database is unavailable. Contact an administrator.
unlock.metaMissing: Encryption metadata is missing on this server.
